title: Existence of an Iterator Function
statement:
Let $(P,S,1)$ be a Peano system, and let $(W,c,g)$ be iterator data for it.
Then there exists a function $f:P\to W$ such that
\[
f(1)=c
\qquad\text{and}\qquad
\forall n\in P\;(f(S(n))=g(f(n))).
\]

current_dependencies.title: Completeness of the Minimal Iterator Relation
Determinism of the Minimal Iterator Relation
